_embedded.description: The embedded resources related to the object if the `expand` query parameter is specified

blocks.description: A list of access block details for the user account

items.description: Describes how the account is blocked from access. If `appliesTo` is `ANY_DEVICES`, then the account is blocked for all devices. If `appliesTo` is `UNKNOWN_DEVICES`, then the account is only blocked for unknown devices.

appliesTo.description: The devices that the block applies to
